markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the services pipeline to secure March kickoffs and refine sales strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**March Kickoffs at Risk:** The pipeline is tight for March, with only two weeks of capacity remaining. Securing two kickoffs per week is critical to hitting quarterly revenue targets.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Marcel as an Accelerant:** Marcel's role is to provide a CEO-level "confidence boost" to close deals, not to run sales meetings. This is formalized with a 3–4 hour weekly budget for Tyler to use strategically.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [**New Urgency Tactic:** To force decisions, Tyler will offer prospects two kickoff dates: one soon and one much later. This creates a "first come, first served" dynamic for limited capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [**Automated Audit Proposal:** Marcel proposed creating automated, personalized audits (e.g., SEMrush, CheckThat) to generate high-value assets (Loom videos) that build urgency and drive bookings.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Urgency & Strategy

  - [**Problem:** March kickoff dates are only two weeks out, creating high pressure to close deals and hit quarterly revenue goals.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new urgency tactic to force decisions from prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Offer:** Two kickoff dates—one soon, one much later.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This creates a "first come, first served" dynamic for limited capacity, forcing prospects to commit.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Messaging:** Emphasize that quality delivery requires dedicated, planned resources.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

### Marcel's Role in Closing

  - [**Purpose:** Marcel's involvement provides a CEO-level "confidence boost" to help prospects commit.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [**Process:** Marcel has a 3–4 hour weekly budget (ideally Wednesdays) for Tyler to use strategically on deals that need a final push.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**Context:** This formalizes a necessary interim process. The long-term goal is to transition Marcel out of daily deals as the team grows, using marketing and other AEs to build relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Deal-Specific Updates

  - [**Vercel:** Legal/security review of the DPA is the final blocker. Cody (internal contact) expected completion today.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Otter:** The deal is stalled despite multiple verbal commitments.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Context:** The CEO is engaged to a CEO at Tavern (a customer), so they know our pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Action:** Tyler to ask Hypergrowth (the referral source) to apply pressure. Marcel to text prospect Felicia.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [**Nerdio:** Marcel is coordinating a meeting with new contacts (Carissa, Ashley) for Thursday/Friday. This meeting is expected to accelerate redlines.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [**Tynes:** Marcel is joining Tyler's follow-up meeting today to help secure a formal commitment from the DM.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Llama Index:** A backup deal that can be closed quickly by finalizing terms (12–15 month contract).](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Future Process Improvements

  - [**Automated Audits:** Marcel proposed creating automated, personalized audits for inbound leads.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
      - [**Tools:** SEMrush for SEO, CheckThat for market perception.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [**Asset:** A quick Loom video walking the prospect through their audit findings.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides high-value insight upfront, building urgency and driving bookings.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [**Website Booking:** Re-enable website booking for Marcel's calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Lowers the friction for initial contact and captures interest immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Process:** Use an EA to filter unqualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Draft urgency emails for Marcel to send to key prospects (Vercel, Otter, Nerdio, Tynes).](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Ask Hypergrowth (via PingG) to follow up with Otter.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [Finalize terms with Llama Index.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Text prospect Felicia (Otter) to push for signature.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [Conduct the follow-up meeting with Tynes today.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Bridget:**](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [Share the cross-functional GTM meeting agenda with Anna.](https://fathom.video/share/HzGs_rjCS9-EKsCvmMsTesM7VMzGLYV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
